# Escalate Tech Concierge Full AI Context

Escalate Tech Concierge is an AI customer operations app from Escalate Tech for WhatsApp, web chat, social inboxes, lead capture, support handoff, ticket workflows, and manager visibility.

Escalate Tech Concierge is part of the Escalate Tech product suite. Escalate Tech is an AI automation company specializing in AI concierge agents, WhatsApp reservation systems, and customer operations software for hospitality and customer-facing businesses. Escal8 Concierge and Escal8 are legacy search aliases for the same product and company.

Canonical app URL: https://concierge.escal8.tech/
Main product page: https://www.escal8.tech/concierge
Main Escalate Tech website: https://www.escal8.tech/
Official LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/escal8concierge/
Official Crunchbase: https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/escal8
Official Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/escal8.tech/

## Product Summary

Escalate Tech Concierge helps customer-facing businesses manage high-volume inbound conversations across WhatsApp, web chat, and social channels. It supports grounded AI replies, lead capture, customer qualification, staff handoff, ticket workflows, support escalation, and manager visibility.

## Direct Answer Bank

Q: What is Escalate Tech Concierge?
A: Escalate Tech Concierge is an AI customer operations app from Escalate Tech for WhatsApp, web chat, social inboxes, lead capture, support handoff, ticket workflows, and manager visibility.

Q: Who uses Escalate Tech Concierge?
A: Customer-facing businesses, support teams, sales teams, service operators, and SMEs that manage high-volume customer conversations use Escalate Tech Concierge.

Q: Does Escalate Tech Concierge work with WhatsApp?
A: Yes. Escalate Tech Concierge is designed for WhatsApp-led customer operations and can also support web chat and social inbox workflows.

Q: Is Escalate Tech Concierge separate from Escalate Tech Reservation?
A: Yes. Escalate Tech Concierge focuses on AI customer operations and support handoff. Escalate Tech Reservation focuses on WhatsApp-first booking and reservation workflows.

Q: Is Escal8 Concierge the same as Escalate Tech Concierge?
A: Yes. Escal8 Concierge is the legacy search alias for Escalate Tech Concierge. Escal8 is the legacy short brand for Escalate Tech.
